title: Rare Earth Minerals: The Hidden War Behind Your Phone
hook: They're in your phone, your car, your weapons. And one country controls the supply.

title: Trump's Tariffs Explained

title: The Gulf War

title: The Fall of Constantinople
hook: The city had survived a thousand years. What finally brought it down in 1453?

title: The 2008 Financial Crisis
hook: Everyone felt it. Almost no one understands what actually happened — or who let it.

title: How Dictatorships Rise
hook: They never start with tanks. They start with something much more ordinary.
